ddls:
CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "payment_creation_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the payment was created */,
  "basket_value_cents" INTEGER /* Value of the basket in cents */,
  "alma_fee_cents" INTEGER /* Fee charged by the payment processor in cents */,
  "mid" TEXT /* Merchant ID associated with the payment */,
  "payment_origin" INTEGER /* Origin of the payment (e.g., WEB_PAYMENT) */,
  "actual_installments_count" INTEGER /* Number of installments for the payment */,
  "fraudulent_payment" INTEGER /* Indicates if the payment is identified as fraudulent */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who made the payment */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Payment method ID used for the payment */,
  "gateway_id" INTEGER /* Payment gateway ID used for the payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique transaction ID from the payment gateway */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code of the transaction */,
  "refunded_amount_cents" INTEGER /* Amount refunded for the payment in cents */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_payment_origin FOREIGN KEY ("payment_origin") REFERENCES payment_origins ("origin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_gateway_id FOREIGN KEY ("gateway_id") REFERENCES payment_gateway_integrations ("gateway_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_method_management ("payment_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_mid FOREIGN KEY ("mid") REFERENCES merchant_ids ("mid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_origins" (
  "origin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment origin */,
  "origin_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment origin (e.g., WEB_PAYMENT) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment origin */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the payment origin is active */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the payment origin */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the payment origin was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the payment origin */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the payment origin was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("origin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "merchant_ids" (
  "mid" TEXT /* Merchant ID */,
  "merchant_name" TEXT /* Name of the merchant */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the merchant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the merchant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the merchant */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the merchant's logo */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the merchant record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the merchant record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the merchant record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the merchant record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mid")
)

CREATE TABLE "installment_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each installment plan */,
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the payment associated with the plan */,
  "installment_count" INTEGER /* Number of installments */,
  "due_dates" TEXT /* List of due dates for each installment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the installment plan (e.g., active, completed, canceled) */,
  "total_installment_amount_cents" INTEGER /* Total amount to be paid in installments */,
  "outstanding_balance_cents" INTEGER /* Remaining balance to be paid */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the installment plan */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the installment plan was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the installment plan */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the installment plan was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_installment_plans_payment_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_id") REFERENCES payments ("payment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fraud_detection" (
  "fraud_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fraud detection process */,
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the payment being analyzed */,
  "detection_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the detection was performed */,
  "detection_method" TEXT /* Method used for fraud detection */,
  "is_fraudulent" INTEGER /* Indicates if the payment is identified as fraudulent */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the fraud detection process */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Detailed reason for the fraud detection result */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the fraud detection record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the fraud detection record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the fraud detection record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the fraud detection record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fraud_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fraud_detection_payment_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_id") REFERENCES payments ("payment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_fees" (
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fee */,
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the payment for which the fee is charged */,
  "fee_amount_cents" INTEGER /* Amount of the fee in cents */,
  "fee_type" TEXT /* Type of the fee (e.g., processing fee, service fee) */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code of the fee */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the fee record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the fee record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the fee record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the fee record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_fees_payment_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_id") REFERENCES payments ("payment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_gateway_integrations" (
  "gateway_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment gateway */,
  "gateway_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment gateway */,
  "integration_date" TEXT /* Date when the gateway was integrated */,
  "supported_payment_methods" TEXT /* List of supported payment methods */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the integration is active */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the integration */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the integration was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the integration */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the integration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gateway_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_gateway_integrations_supported_payment_methods FOREIGN KEY ("supported_payment_methods") REFERENCES payment_method_management ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_method_management" (
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment method (e.g., credit card, digital wallet) */,
  "supported_gateways" TEXT /* List of gateways supporting the method */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Count of times the method has been used */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the payment method is active */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the payment method record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the payment method record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the payment method record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the payment method record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_method_management_supported_gateways FOREIGN KEY ("supported_gateways") REFERENCES payment_gateway_integrations ("gateway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, admin) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the user record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the user record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
